programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: After years of begging Mike and Frank to let her go on a pick, Danielle finally gets her chance.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With an oversize collection of enormous steam engines, Gene's 17-acre North Carolina property is like an open-air museum where the guys start searching for smaller items they can actually move.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As the guys are winding down their trip through the South, Danielle finds them the mother lode of rare motorbike parts in an old warehouse packed with new vintage Harley stock.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Determined to uncover a hidden honey hole, the guys are freestyling on their home turf in Iowa.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Looking for picks in Texas, the guys see a sign for Gilley's Club, the honky-tonk club made famous in the 1980 film Urban Cowboy. Soon they're face to face with country music superstar Mickey Gilley himself.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cruising along the California coastline, the guys know they're in for something big. Mil Blair founded the iconic motorcycle magazine Easyriders and, for the first time ever, the legend is willing to sell some of his rare collections of motorbikes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike and Frank visit a hangar-sized barn full of treasures, owned by a couple of junkyard junkies who've been picking since 1948. An awesome circus property turned animal preserve features lions, tigers, and bears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a man hoping to sell a mysterious coin from the 1800's believed to be from George Washington's funeral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars zoom in on a long lost picture by America's most famous photographer Ansel Adams.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Come party with the Pawn Stars as they prepare the ultimate gift for the Old Man's 70th birthday, a fully rebuilt 1957 Chevy 150.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to be boarded when a customer brings in a 1600's naval blunderbuss. A small weapon thought to be for a child, will this pint-size gun bring an adult-size price or will this deal end up shooting blanks?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick tries to refurbish a 1950's coke machine into a modernized collector's item. Will his plan quench his thirst or fizzle out and go flat? Meanwhile, Corey is offered an old pirate favorite: an 18th Century flintlock pistol.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy the iconic suit of Kentucky Fried Chicken founder Colonel Sanders.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond catapults into his most passionate adventure -- not for country, not for justice, but for personal revenge. Timothy Dalton brings urgency, charm and deadly determination to his role as 007.

programme.title: 007: Casino Royale (ESP)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) enfrenta un desafío mortal: evitar que Le Chiffre, un peligroso banquero, gane un juego de póker multimillonario y utilice sus ganancias para financiar el terrorismo global.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: 007: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: 007: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: 007: Casino Royale (ESP)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) enfrenta un desafío mortal: evitar que Le Chiffre, un peligroso banquero, gane un juego de póker multimillonario y utilice sus ganancias para financiar el terrorismo global.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: During an historic counter-terrorism summit in Spain, the President of the United States is struck down by an assassin's bullet. Eight strangers have a perfect view of the kill, but what did they really see? Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers

programme.title: Dirty Pair
programme.desc: Join in on the adventures of Kei and Yui in The Dirty Pair.

programme.title: Death Note: Tactics
programme.desc: Soichiro Yagami demands to meet with L in person when he finds out that L has secretly brought FBI agents into Japan.

programme.title: Death Note: Unraveling
programme.desc: Light meets a woman at the Police Department with an urgent message for the Kira task force.

programme.title: Death Note: Overcast
programme.desc: Light uses the Death Note to try to get rid of the woman who could get him captured, and is shocked when it doesn't work.

programme.title: Death Note: Glare
programme.desc: L insists on setting up bugs and cameras in the homes of Chief Yagami and Deputy Director Kitamura.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: While Gon is on his date with Palm, Killua encounters Rammot in the forest. Just when their battle is about to begin, Killua hears his brother's voice in his head, telling him to run away.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Knuckle and Morel appear to be overwhelmed by the speed of Cheetu's attacks, but they have a chance at victory.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Kalluto, Feitan, Shalnark, Phinks, Shizuku, and Bonolenov meet in Meteor City, the home of the Phantom Troupe. They have returned after getting the news that the Chimera Ant, Zazan, has built her nest in their city.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The members of the Phantom Troupe go to Zazan's nest to defeat her. The Troupe splits up to confront Zazan's minions individually. As they battle, each member of the Troupe reveals their secret ability.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: A pair of Chimera Ants appears and hunts Gon under the cover of night, overwhelming him with their attacks. Feeling that things are at a standstill, he gathers up his Nen and prepares to throw a punch.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Knuckle and Shoot are lying in wait for Cheetu. But just as Cheetu is about to approach them, he suddenly changes direction and disappears. Meanwhile, Killua and Gon sense that someone is following them again.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The assassin Ikalgo, an octopus-type Chimera Ant, attacks Killua with his Nen Abilities. Killua captures him and tells Ikalgo that he'll let him live if he divulges his ally's abilities.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un gancho de acero de cuatro libras atraviesa el cráneo de Gail Creek, el cirujano de trauma Joe Eric Johnston tiene la imposible tarea de mantenerlo vivo. El humor del inodoro adquiere un nuevo significado para la Dra. Dee Larcheveque.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La doctora Alexandra Dresel pone a prueba su entrenamiento cuando una víctima de atraco llega a la sala de emergencias. El Dr. Mauricio Heilbron Jr. debe probar los límites de su autocontrol cuando se le asignan dos casos increíbles.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una madre y su hijo de 6 años son llevados rápidamente a la sala de emergencias del Dr. Kevin Veale después de un horrible accidente automovilístico. El cirujano ortopédico Dr. Douglas Lundy encuentra que su experiencia médica no es suficiente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un bebé aparentemente sano desarrolla repentinamente una deficiencia de oxígeno. Cuando la policía trae a un hombre desaliñado que dice ser el Ministro de un pequeño pueblo, el Dr. Kivela sospecha que hay más en la historia de lo que parece.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos usan un robot operado por un especialista en otro hospital para tratar a un niño de 7 años con convulsiones

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una paciente no puede recordar los últimos 20 años de su vida, pero para tratarla sus médicos necesita saber desesperadamente lo que ha olvidado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos luchan por salvar a un joven traído a urgencias congelado y sin pulso; un hombre se enferma de muerte mientras asiste a su propia fiesta de aniversario.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Tres pacientes introducen a escondidas a sus mascotas en el hospital, provocando un caos en la sala de emergencias; un hombre experimenta una parálisis que sube desde las piernas hasta los pulmones.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Leah tears up as Cheyenne gives birth to her son. Briana swoons over Tyler's romantic plans for Catelynn's babymoon. Barb & Deb take Taylor's side when he argues with Maci over childcare. Jade & Chau are excited to see Mackenzie's Dad.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Leah, Jaylan & Corey are glad to see Gary join Amber for her therapy session. The Y& P moms are shocked by Maci & Taylor's relationship talk. Briana & Brittany question Mackenzie's parenting. Ashley & Bar are concerned & happy when Catelynn gives birth.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Briana, Roxanne & Brittany are conflicted about Gary not telling Amber that Leah's seeing a therapist. Leah relates to Maci that she puts too much pressure on herself. Jade, Chau & Christy doubt social media is responsible for Makenzie's issues.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan siente envidia de Óscar y Jimena y presiona a Norma para que también se mude a la hacienda. En un arrebato de celos, Concha llega a la fiesta y le dispara a Leonidas al verlo con Melisa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma asiste a la exposición de caballos, Carmela hostiga a la empleada que cuida al bebé y se queda con él con malas intenciones, Norma se devuelve a tiempo y la saca a empujones del cuarto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo se preocupan por los pésimos resultados obtenidos en la feria de caballos y descubren que Fernando vendió los mejores ejemplares de la hacienda, Gabriela lo encara y él la enreda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara ve a Malcolm cuando espía a Norma en la tina y las dos lo acorralan para caerle a golpes. Quintina y Dominga se van a las manos por Olegario, Ruth se entera de quién es su verdadera mamá.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma revisa los informes de la hacienda y comprueba sus sospechas, Eva detiene a Ruth cuando se marcha de la casa y le aclara por qué la abandonó, Quintina y Dominga se vengan de Olegario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan llega con la policía a reclamarle a Fernando la golpiza a Olegario, ambos son llevados a la comisaría. Por las noches la hacienda Elizondo se convierte en un casino de apuestas y negocios.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma atrapa a Fernando con una mujer en la cama, él envuelve a Gabriela en otra mentira y pelea con Norma en el balcón desde donde cae por accidente. Concha salva a los Reyes de una emboscada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando aprovecha su quebranto para manipular a Gabriela y amenaza de muerte a Norma. Franco cree que ella y Sara corren peligro y les recomienda que salgan de la hacienda cuanto antes.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the one million dollar prize on the line, the final three teams race to Chicago where they must complete their final challenges within the city's most iconic landmarks, including a trip to Wrigley Field, the home of the World Champion Chicago Cubs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: 11 of the most competitive teams in Amazing Race history take on the ultimate challenge for a shot at a Million Dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: How will a pair of Indy Car racers handle a self-drive in Saint-Tropez, France?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stakes are high as teams face the Double U-Turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers swap teammates for an entire leg for the first time ever in Amazing Race history!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Will one team's game be on the line when they misplace their passport?

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie keeps a secret club oath even in the face of the serious accusation of burning down a barn.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches a wealthy young man the satisfaction of self-reliance.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The men of Mayberry, after a slow start, accept the addition of a lovely manicurist to Floyd's barbershop.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Mayberry resident is convinced that he is a jinx until Andy helps restore his selfconfidence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The small-town methods of Mayberry prove more effective than the attempts of the State Police in the capture of a criminal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Opie finishes last at a track race, Andy struggles to teach his son what it means to be a good loser.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy’s diplomacy and engineering skills are required to help the Mayberry choir adjust to the recent addition of tone-deaf Barney Fife to the group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are hard pressed when Mayberry's guest of honor turns out to be a pickpocket.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses his wits to help a struggling salesman stay in Mayberry despite strong pressure from the competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee becomes warden for a day when she disciplines Otis Campbell after he is arrested for his usual drunken behavior.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is forced to exert all his persuasiveness to get a farmer to take a tetanus shot.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the big city and help to catch a notorious jewel thief in the process.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee begins dating the dry cleaner because she wants to give Andy space to pursue his own relationships.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney learns the hard way that three’s a crowd, when Andy and Mary Simpson try to find time alone together.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd expands his barbershop with the addition of a second barber. The new barber turns out to be a gambling bookie that Barney and Andy must catch in the act.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is put on trial for his law enforcement practices when a Raleigh newspaper reporter writes a damaging article about the lawman.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's cousin Virgil gets over his awkwardness as soon as he learns that people have confidence in his ability.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Otis Campbell’s brother comes to visit, Andy agrees to make Otis a temporary deputy to cover the lie Otis told about his career.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy fears Opie has an imaginary friend when he starts telling tall tales.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend Peggy McMillan gets along fine with Andy until he discovers that her father is rich.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry's new mayor doesn't like Andy or the way he does his job.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee heads out of town for a few days, leaving Andy and Opie to take care of themselves. When Peggy volunteers to cook for them, Floyd tries to convince Andy that she's trying to catch a husband.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry mayor demands that Andy get a crime expert from the city to help solve several cow thefts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to set Andy up when he mistakenly perceives that Andy is suffering from a broken heart.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife loses his self-confidence when two farmers ignore his warning.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry band, composed of more flats than sharps, gets ready for its annual trip to the state band competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd the barber has misrepresented his worldly goods to a wealthy window, who decides to visit him.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Look into the distance with Bob Ross and experience the peace and quiet of a stoic mountain overlooking a smooth-as-glass wilderness lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Cross a frozen stream under the shelter of a grand covered bridge and enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful Bob Ross winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grandest of mountains overlooking an incredibly breathtaking waterfall … a Bob Ross painting you must see to believe!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A visit with Bob Ross takes you to a secluded cabin, snuggled deep into the blankety drifts of fluffy snow, far into the frozen mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The soft sky and snow-blanketed ground give this cozy barn a quiet place to sleep and dream a while; Bob Ross's paintbrushes make it happen.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll into the quiet stillness of early daybreak with Bob Ross as he captures the essence of a sun shrouded forest on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The stillness of a winter's day, with a happy sun shining bright in the sky, can be beautifully captured on canvas, and Bob Ross shows you how.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In a densely covered spot hidden far from the nearest roadway lies a softly nestled quiet little pond; Bob Ross invites you to take a peek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Just a few quick, color-filled strokes and a little shanty with crisp evergreens and bright meadow appear - paint with Bob Ross!

programme.title: Bob Ross: The Happy Painter
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the beloved painter's journey from humble beginnings to pop-culture icon, how one local TV ad evolved into a phenomenon.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Truly picture perfect. A bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to the middle of winter, where shades of indigo create the stark reality of the season. You'd better bundle up for this one!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an oval scene with warm brown and gold tones that captures the essence of a lonely forest river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: To capture the innocence of a stream-side cottage, Bob Ross creates a giant mountain standing majestically in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the sounds of quiet waters, velvety green shrubs, and distant foothills. Bob Ross creates a perfect scene of relaxation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross and visit the north in the middle of winter! Snow and ice abound in a profusion of beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Real or imaginary? It doesn't matter which as Bob Ross captures a great mountain and forest scene on specially cut plywood!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the cold shadows with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of a winter night at the foot of a large fierce waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll down to the river and cast your line with Bob Ross from the bridge - join in the fun and paint this masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an expansive barn appearing half-covered in a snowy setting of frost-bitten foliage and sun-kissed sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A bevy of beauties, including a stunning new cruise director, board the Pacific Princess for an all-woman voyage to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Mystery abounds when a woman becomes friendly with a man she knew in a past life but he doesn't remember her. At the same time, Captain Stubing pursues a beautiful passenger who seems intent on avoiding him.

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha shows how to properly move an established tree on her very own Christmas tree farm; she gives a tour of her pinetum where she teaches about new and unusual conifer trees.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha brings the outdoors inside the home and shares her love of houseplants; she shows how to take care of the most popular houseplants and how to propagate them to create new plants.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.desc: Los aliados de Alexandria atacan a la vez diferentes guaridas de los Saviors, pero estos los superan en número y armamento y la batalla va a ser intensa, cruel y no exenta de bajas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors poseen un arma de gran potencia que pretenden transportar para ayudar a Negan. Ezekiel, que ha sobrevivido a la matanza de sus hombres, y Carol, aislada en territorio enemigo, son los únicos que pueden impedir la entrega del arma.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gabriel y Negan tienen que cooperar para salir con vida de la casa en la que están encerrados, con decenas de muertos vivientes tratando de comérselos. Mientras, los lugartenientes de Negan se dan cuenta de que uno de ellos es un traidor, ¿quién?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick visita a Jadis para convencerla de que se una a ellos en la lucha contra Negan. En Hilltop, Gregory sugiere a Maggie, que está enojada con Jesus porque está alimentando a los prisioneros, que los ahorque. Carl se encuentra con Siddiq.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Tara rompen el muro del Santuario y los zombis entran al recinto. Negan exige a Eugene que idee una manera de sacarlos con vida de allí. Jadis prepara a Rick una muerte horrenda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan y sus hombres atacan a las tres comunidades rebeldes al mismo tiempo. Sin Rick, Carl asume la defensa de Alexandria, cercada por el propio Negan. Mientras, Simon detiene al ejército de Hilltop en la carretera y Gavin quiere capturar a Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl hace una última petición a Rick y Michonne antes de morir. Mientras tanto, Morgan y Carol intentan rescatar a Ezekiel antes de que Gavin se lo entregue vivo a Negan para que este lo torture y asesine delante de sus seguidores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan ordena a Simon que mate solo a uno de los hombres de Jadis como escarmiento, pero Simon tiene sed de venganza. Mientras, Rick se dirige al basurero del grupo de Jadis para renovar su alianza, y Aaron sigue intentando obtener un acuerdo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A Maggie se le acaban las reservas de alimentos y debe decidir si deja que los presos pasen hambre. Mientras, Daryl guía a los supervivientes de Alexandria a través de un pantano repleto de zombis, y la adversidad pone a prueba la fe de Gabriel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick ataca a Negan cuando este se dirigía a Hilltop y terminan enfrentándose en un edificio abandonado, pero Simon y Dwight siguen el rastro de Negan. Mientras tanto, Maggie, Enid, Michonne y Rosita discuten sobre la propuesta de una desconocida.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Johnny Tapia vs Danny Romero
programme.desc: On July 18th, 1997, Johnny Tapia fought Danny Romero for the IBF & WBO Super Flyweight Titles at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a highly anticipated fight and an incredible battle, Tapia came out on top with a close unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Hussein Hussein
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Jorge Arce fought Hussein Hussein in a WBC Flyweight Title Eliminator at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In an action-packed fight, the victorious Jorge Arce scored the knockdown in the 10th round that stopped the fight.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Wilfredo Vazquez Jr.
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2011, Jorge Arce fought Wilfredo Vazquez Jr for the WBO Super Bantamweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a very close fight that might have been a draw, Vazquez Jr's corner controversially threw in the towel in the final round.

programme.title: Jose Luis Castillo vs. Stevie Johnston 1
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000, Jose Luis Castillo fought Stevie Johnston for the WBC Lightweight Title in Bell Gardens, California. In a very close fight, Castillo took the world by surprise with a majority decision victory that was The Ring Upset of the Year.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Amir Imam
programme.desc: On March 17th, 2018 Jose Ramirez fought Amir Imam for the vacant WBC World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden Hulu Theater in New York with the twelve-round bout ending in a unanimous decision win for Ramirez.

programme.title: Lloyd Honeyghan vs Donald Curry
programme.desc: On September 27th, 1986 Lloyd Honeyghan faced Donald Curry for the IBF, WBA and WBC World Welterweight title at the Caesars Palace in Atlantic City in a 15 round bout that ended in the sixth giving Honeyghan the win.

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.desc: A prominent photographer hatches a scheme to cover up his wife's murder with a phony kidnapping plot.

programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Raoul de Moreney -- a slick card shark and fortune hunter -- comes to Tombstone in search of quick riches. His vicious greed nettles the editor of the Epitaph and, in a flush of anger, the two men agree to a duel…but de Moreney is a deadly duelist.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is on the scene when horse thieves Cat and Jesse Crail try to trigger a war between two Indian tribes. Purpose of the Crail maneuver: They plan to steal the Indians' horses while the braves are at each others' throats.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Army Civilian Scout Bat Masterson (Gene Barry) nearly gets his neck stretched in an affair involving Colorado politics when he finds he needs to extricate himself from a capitol charge arising from a Major's ravenous political ambitions.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The cry of 'Silver!' is heard again in Monument City, a ghost mining camp once the scene of a historic silver strike. Prospector Bat Masterson, who has an old claim, returns to Monument City to find he's road-blocked by Clay Adams and Harvey Mason.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson becomes a 'Pinkerton.' The famous detective agency baffled in their attempts to expose crime chieftain John Kelso enlists Bat to find evidence that will put Kelso behind bars permanently.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson nearly gets one tombstone more than he bargained for while en route to Tombstone, Arizona. Bat, bushwhacked by gunmen and left for dead, is found by Marshal Sam Phelps.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson takes on the job of guard and bouncer in El Paso's famed Royal Flush Saloon. The most frequent invaders of the Royal Flush are bandit raiders. Dodge City's famed Wyatt Earp makes himself handy in the ensuing fracas.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: It's a showdown at Jackson Hole when Bat Masterson ferrets out the men who murdered one of his friends. Dirty politics 'pork barrel' and two attempts on Bat's life make this a highly colorful episode in the life of the great Bat Masterson.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp recalls in court the details of the day when the Clanton gang rode into Tombstone to shoot it out with the Earps.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: After the shootout, Sheriff Behan wants the Earps and Doc hung or shot. Behan plans to charge them with murder while Curly Brocius and Johnny Ringo plan quicker revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Initially resistant to becoming a lawman, Wyatt Earp has a change of heart after seeing the sheriff of Ellsworth, Kansas murdered by the inebriated brother of town scourge Ben Thompson.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp jails Ben Thompson in the hope that his brother Bill will attempt a jailbreak, but the Marshall underestimates the naive Abbie Crandall, who is also determined to help Ben escape.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp's insistence on patiently stalking the Thompson brothers with a pair of Indian scouts doesn't sit well with some Ellsworth citizens who demand immediate capture of the two fugitives.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A quick-tempered former Confederate officer with a grudge against Wyatt threatens to destroy Ellsworth if Wyatt is not immediately stripped of his badge and run out of town.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt leaves Ellsworth and becomes the Marshall of Wichita. His first challenge is a group of local vigilantes intent on hanging a man that may have been acting in self-defense.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bennett hires a gunman to shoot Earp who brags he has faced down Earp before. However, Earp doesn't know him so he suspects there is more to the gunman's story.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lew Wallace is governor of New Mexico Territory during Billy the Kid's murderous era in the 1880s.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lt. Bradshaw is tasked with enforcing a tax on immigrant miners despite his conflicted sympathies.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A hate-filled drifter threatens successful rancher John Gaunt and his family.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In the years after California's conquest, an Army commander grapples with hostile citizens.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A couple face a strong opponent to their marriage: the governor of California, whom the woman once rejected.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: When another Northern boat comes steaming into the Outer Banks, the Southerners fear a full-scale invasion.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: It’s early, but it’s obvious that even an experienced fisherman might not have what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: When the Outer Banks winds take a turn for the worse, it’s man against sea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: A winter storm whips up rough seas, and ices in the harbor, forcing captains to take huge risks.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: In North Carolina’s Outer Banks fishing ground, only half of the Bluefin tuna quota is left to catch.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: As breakdowns and bad luck plague various boats, it remains to be seen if a Northern boat will rise to the top

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: The northern and southern boats must scramble to catch as many fish as possible while there’s still time.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: With the quota near capacity, the captains must brave treacherous conditions as they fight for final paychecks

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: North vs South
programme.desc: It’s zero hour, with the quota about to close and the Southern boats battling the invading Yankee vessels.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Some of New England’s best fishermen head south to North Carolina’s famed fishing grounds The Outer Banks.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A bridge, bombs and a few badass ladies rejigger the fleet on day three of Bluefin tuna fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A greenhorn struggles to prove himself to his father, while the rest of the fleet battle the elements.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Two North Carolina fishing veterans battle each other for top spot of the Outer Banks’ Bluefin tuna fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Treacherous winter weather in the Outer Banks fishing grounds forces captains to push their limits.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A crewmember faces a family emergency unfolding on land that tests his resolve on the water.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Two Southern captains face off in battle, while one Northern boat hauls in the biggest fish of the season.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.desc: Grand Dragon Leviathan's thunderous roars unleash hundred-foot tall waves worldwide! How can Yugi stop the annihilation of the planet?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang have saved the world from Dartz and his Grand Dragon Leviathan, but they're about to face their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is trapped inside the Duel Dome, and the only way to escape is by defeating the Duel Computer, programmed with the skills of the world's top duelists. Since the Duel Computer has access to thousands of cards, how can Yugi win?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the start of the KC Grand Championship! Sixteen of the world's greatest duelists vie for a chance to challenge Yugi as the King of Games!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: How does Apdnarg Otum know all of Joey's strategies? How can Joey stop Apdnarg when he gathers his ancient cards to unleash the fiercest monster from the great past? But the biggest mystery... how can Joey not know who Apdnarg Otum is?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the second match of the KC Grand Championship as Rebecca faces the kung-fu kicking Asia champion Vivian Wong. However, there's more at stake than just winning the duel - Yugi's heart is on the line, whether he likes it or not.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first round is over, leaving eight duelists to compete for the right to face Yugi for the KC Grand Championship. Unfortunately for Joey, his next opponent is Zigfried Lloyd, who defeated both Weevil and Rex Raptor in one turn.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zigfried activates Ride of the Valkyries, the same card that defeated both Weevil and Rex Raptor at the same time.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the semifinals of the KC Grand Championship, it's a duel between child prodigies as Rebecca faces Leon Wilson and his fairy tale faction.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi finds Grandpa's kidnapper, but is it really a kidnapping? While Yugi unravels the truth, Rebecca starts to unravel when her dragons fall prey to Leon's fervent fables. Rebecca must think of a new plan quickly or there will be no happy ending.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Zigfried vs. Leon for the right to challenge Yugi in the KC Grand Championship Finals... but Kaiba stops the duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a battle between Zigfried and Kaiba. Zigfried quickly gains the advantage by destroying Kaiba's monsters before he can even draw them!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Yugi vs. Leon for the title of King of Games at the KC Grand Championship! Something sinister lurks in the shadows, for this duel is more than just getting the crown. Zigfried's greatest revenge will commence as his real plan is unleashed.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Leon is Zigfried's younger brother, and he'll avenge his family's loss. Leon's fairy tales are giving Yugi nightmares but the worst is yet to come as Leon has Zigfried's mysterious and special card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Golden Castle of Stromberg is infecting the world's Duel Disks with a virus that will destroy KaibaCorp. If Yugi doesn't destroy the card, the virus program can't be stopped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang goes on an exotic trip to India, but when their plane crashes in a deserted forest, their vacation turns into a dangerous game of survival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Realizing that they've become part of a real-life version of the Capsule Monsters board game, the gang struggles to find a way out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice. But their celebration is soon interrupted by a pack of man-eating wolves, a giant turtle, and an angry Genie!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the "Fortress of Fear." Now they have until sunset to find this mysterious structure or they'll be trapped in the world of Capsule Monsters forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends discover that in order to return home to the real world they must pass a series of tests: the Five Sacred Trials. The first of which pits them against enormous sand worms and a mysterious voice that travels with the desert wind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping their battle in the desert, the gang finds themselves stranded on a mysterious floating island, where they face a monster that derives its strength from the sun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat confront a competing baby-sitting service when they post bad reviews about Sam and Cat's baby-sitting service.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat convinces Sam to participate in a texting competition; Dice tries to avoid an old friend.

programme.title: Victorious: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Victorious: Wok Star
programme.desc: Tori agrees to help Jade find a theater to perform a play Jade wrote. But when the sponsor demands changes that will ruin Jade's play, Tori has to make things right before opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: Victorious: Helen Back Again
programme.desc: When Principal Eikner leaves Hollywood Arts, the school hires a new principal who makes all the students re-audition in order to keep their spots. Who will get kicked out?

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!

programme.title: Victorious: The Breakfast Bunch
programme.desc: Tori and the gang are forced to spend a Saturday in detention after a lunch trip gone wrong. They have the whole day to learn about each other, find food, and try not to earn more detention.

programme.title: Victorious: The Worst Couple
programme.desc: Jade and Beck help Sinjin with his new game show, "The Worst Couple," but it puts their relationship to the test. Meanwhile, Tori breaks her precious Pear Phone.

programme.title: Victorious: Andre's Horrible Girl
programme.desc: Tori notices some changes in her friend Andre, whose girlfriend seems to be overbearing and controlling. Meanwhile, Jade and Cat try to earn easy money dog-sitting in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Victorious: Car, Rain, & Fire
programme.desc: Cat's favorite actress dies and she talks Tori and Jade into driving to the actress' house to hold a vigil. Meanwhile, Trina directs a play starring herself, with Beck, Andre, and Robbie.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori & Jade's Play Date
programme.desc: Tori and Jade play a married couple putting their acting abilities and uneasy friendship to the test. Meanwhile, Cat & Robbie start a service where they deliver bad news in a friendly way.
